heading: Four ways I ship audit-grade AI into regulated enterprises
subhead: Same playbook across Financial Services, Telecom, and ICT — every engagement ties to a € or % target agreed up front, with EU AI Act compliance baked in.

items.title: AI-Augmented Process Transformation
items.desc: Daily production stack: Claude Code CLI + Model Context Protocol (MCP), ChatGPT Enterprise, Microsoft Copilot Studio, Google Antigravity, n8n. 60% documentation-time savings on E-form transformation at S.W.I.F.T.

items.title: Process Mining & SOP Extraction
items.desc: Celonis EMS and SAP Signavio for end-to-end process discovery; LLM-assisted SOP extraction from source code, tickets, and audit logs. Find your three highest-ROI AI bets in 30 days.

items.title: Cost & License Consolidation
items.desc: Merge duplicate enterprise processes, retire legacy tools. EUR 500k+ license savings delivered at NTT Ltd. by collapsing 3 Opp2Cash workflows into one. Aggregate EUR 1.1M+ across engagements.

items.title: AI Governance & EU AI Act Readiness
items.desc: Audit-grade AI shipping: model risk lineage, transparency obligations, conformity assessment. Lean Six Sigma + ITIL governance fluency keeps regulated enterprises compliant while AI ships.
